name: Editorial Field Journal
purpose: A Guizang-informed art direction layer for Remotion editorial films. It supplies constrained layouts and visual roles; Remotion owns timing and motion.
source_influence: Guizang Magazine Web PPT: editorial hierarchy, theme rhythm, serif display, monospace metadata, and named layout families.

layout_families.structure: Full-bleed editorial image with a bottom-left paper text block.
layout_families.motion: Only a controlled image settle; article title and brand are present at frame zero.

layout_families.structure: One full-width statement axis with four aligned source rows that converge on one operating idea.
layout_families.motion: Rows enter on a shared baseline; the conclusion does not appear until the rows resolve.

layout_families.structure: One full-width statement above three equal operating nodes and a bounded feedback loop.
layout_families.motion: Nodes establish first. Connector strokes only draw after their endpoints are visible.

motion_rules: A heading has one reading axis and never shares a narrow column with supporting copy.
Every transformed object remains inside its declared layout slot and protected caption zone.
No decorative progress bars, green caption rules, or generic dashboard chrome.
Accent colors encode roles: cyan for field connection, coral for the deployment gap, amber for evidence only.
Transitions are clean cuts or a brief paper field, never a crossfade between two information-heavy layouts.
qa: The identity, title, and subtitle are visible at the first meaningful frame.
No title wraps because of a side-column constraint.
Connector lines never appear before the nodes they connect.
Each layout retains the declared safe area at all animated frames.
